name: Camelback Inn's Coconut Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. Dredge shrimp in flour.
2. Dip them in egg.
3. Roll in shredded coconut.
4. Deep-fry shrimp at 350 degrees Fahrenheit until golden brown in color.
5. Serve with Honey Mustard Horseradish Sauce.
Sauce Directions:
Combine all ingredients and mix together thoroughly.
